strengths: Exceeds 15-year minimum with 19 years of software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure domains
Proven entrepreneurial track record founding GISCollective (8+ years active); demonstrates long-term product vision and business ownership
Documented leadership through organizing Refactoring Dojos, creating technical workshops, and mentoring across multiple organizations
concerns: No advanced degree in AI/ML; educational background limited to BS degrees with no AI specialization (Master's/PhD in AI is preferred)
Limited demonstrated AI/ML expertise—current role mentions AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks but lacks evidence of shipped AI products or ML implementation depth
Career trajectory shows Staff/Senior engineer positions, below Director-level individual contributor seniority expected for this specialized role
response.justification: Bogdan meets the 15-year engineering minimum (19 years documented) and demonstrates entrepreneurial strength through founding and maintaining GISCollective for 8+ years. His technical breadth across web, mobile, infrastructure, and current AI-agent work is solid, and his mentorship through workshops and coding dojos shows leadership capability. However, the role's core focus is AI strategy specialization. The résumé mentions current AI-agent infrastructure work but provides no substantiated evidence of AI product development, ML model training, architectural decisions on AI systems, or shipped AI-powered platforms—a critical gap for a Principal Engineer in AI Strategy. Additionally, his career shows Senior/Staff engineer titles rather than Director-level positions, falling short of the role's seniority expectation. He has the technical foundation and entrepreneurial mindset but lacks the AI specialization and top-tier seniority this position requires.
